text: I feel like something might be wrong — I can't put my finger on it.
label: non-infectious

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 9 day(s), deteriorating, though I think I'm slowly getting better. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 3 day(s).
label: influenza/mild

text: I think I'm coming down with something — bit of a fever, muscle aches, dry cough, 6 day(s) now, though I think I'm slowly getting better. I have a very high fever.
label: influenza/mild

text: I think I'm coming down with something — bit of a fever, muscle aches, dry cough, 1 day(s) now, and it's been the same for a while now.
label: influenza/mild

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 4 day(s) ago.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 8 day(s). My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 10 day(s) now, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 9 day(s) now. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 9 day(s) now. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 10 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: pneumonia/moderate
